			<h3>Pattern Exploration</h3>		
														<a href="http://localhost/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="Rectangle 595 (1)" data-e-action-hash="#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dlightbox%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6MjI0LCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwOlwvXC9kZW1vLmF0aGVtZXMuY29tXC9zeWRuZXktbWFpblwvd3AtY29udGVudFwvdXBsb2Fkc1wvc2l0ZXNcLzEyOFwvMjAyMVwvMTBcL1JlY3RhbmdsZS01OTUtMS5qcGcifQ%3D%3D">
							<img width="758" height="1024" src="http://demo.athemes.com/sydney-main/wp-content/uploads/sites/128/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1-758x1024.jpg" alt="" srcset="https://demo.athemes.com/sydney-main/wp-content/uploads/sites/128/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1-758x1024.jpg 758w, https://demo.athemes.com/sydney-main/wp-content/uploads/sites/128/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1-222x300.jpg 222w, https://demo.athemes.com/sydney-main/wp-content/uploads/sites/128/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1-768x1038.jpg 768w, https://demo.athemes.com/sydney-main/wp-content/uploads/sites/128/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1-230x311.jpg 230w, https://demo.athemes.com/sydney-main/wp-content/uploads/sites/128/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1-350x473.jpg 350w, https://demo.athemes.com/sydney-main/wp-content/uploads/sites/128/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1-480x649.jpg 480w, http://localhost/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/Rectangle-595-1.jpg 811w" sizes="(max-width: 758px) 100vw, 758px" />								</a>
			<h6>Your Identity</h6>		
			<h3>Pattern Exploration</h3>		
														<a href="http://localhost/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/Rectangle-595-3.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="Rectangle 595 (3)" data-e-action-hash="#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dlightbox%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6NTQ2LCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwOlwvXC9kZW1vLmF0aGVtZXMuY29tXC9zeWRuZXktbWFpblwvd3AtY29udGVudFwvdXBsb2Fkc1wvc2l0ZXNcLzEyOFwvMjAyMVwvMTFcL1JlY3RhbmdsZS01OTUtMy5qcGcifQ%3D%3D">

			<h6>Your Identity</h6>

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<h2>Contact us</h2>		
		<p style="margin:0;">Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Ut elit tellus, luctus nec ullamcorper mattis, pulvinar
dapibus leo.</p>		
			<h6>Email</h6>		
			<h6>office@example.com</h6>		
			<h6>Location</h6>		
			<h6>74 Pine St, NY, NY 10005</h6>

			<h3>Send us a message and we will respond <br> as quickly as possible.</h3>

<p>Similique quis a libero enim quod corporis saepe quis. Perspiciatis velit quae consectetur consequatur eligendi. Omnis officiis quis culpa possimus exercitationem nesciunt commodi mollitia. Aut eum in est. In facere non. Corporis cumque sapiente deleniti placeat magnam sunt excepturi est sit.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:heading {"level":3} -->
<h3>Corporis cumque sapiente</h3>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Est aut sed eaque consequatur rerum nulla maxime tempore voluptate. Rerum modi facere reiciendis animi labore. Explicabo suscipit rerum. Quasi exercitationem adipisci architecto vitae provident sed eum. Aut nobis aut. In in reprehenderit officiis. Similique quis a libero enim quod corporis saepe quis. Aut eum in est. In facere non. Corporis cumque sapiente deleniti placeat magnam sunt excepturi est sit.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:heading {"level":3} -->
<h3>Corporis cumque sapiente</h3>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Est aut sed eaque consequatur rerum nulla maxime tempore voluptate. Rerum modi facere reiciendis animi labore. Explicabo suscipit rerum. Quasi exercitationem adipisci architecto vitae provident sed eum. Aut nobis aut. In in reprehenderit officiis. Similique quis a libero enim quod corporis saepe quis. <h2 class="wp-block-heading">About Me</h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"style":{"typography":{"fontSize":"18px"}}} -->
<p style="font-size:18px">Write a compelling introduction about yourself here. Share your background, experience, and what drives you. This is your opportunity to connect with visitors on a personal level and establish trust.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"style":{"typography":{"fontSize":"18px"}}} -->
<p style="font-size:18px">Highlight your unique value proposition and explain how you can help your visitors. Keep it authentic and focused on the benefits you provide. End with a call to action or an invitation to learn more.</p>

<!-- /wp:column -->

<!-- wp:column {"style":{"border":{"radius":"20px"},"spacing":{"padding":{"top":"var:preset|spacing|40","bottom":"var:preset|spacing|40","left":"var:preset|spacing|40","right":"var:preset|spacing|40"}}},"backgroundColor":"background-secondary"} -->
<div class="wp-block-column has-background-secondary-background-color has-background" style="border-radius:20px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)"><!-- wp:paragraph {"style":{"typography":{"fontStyle":"normal","fontWeight":"600","fontSize":"14px"},"elements":{"link":{"color":{"text":"var:preset|color|secondary"}}}},"textColor":"secondary"} -->
<p class="has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color" style="font-size:14px;font-style:normal;font-weight:600">03</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:heading {"level":3,"style":{"spacing":{"margin":{"top":"var:preset|spacing|20","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0"}}},"fontSize":"medium"} -->
<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-medium-font-size" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);margin-right:0;margin-bottom:0;margin-left:0">Support</h3>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"style":{"spacing":{"margin":{"top":"var:preset|spacing|10","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0"}},"typography":{"lineHeight":"1.5"},"elements":{"link":{"color":{"text":"var:preset|color|secondary"}}}},"textColor":"secondary","fontSize":"small"} -->
<p class="has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-small-font-size" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--10);margin-right:0;margin-bottom:0;margin-left:0;line-height:1.5">Ongoing assistance and maintenance to ensure your projects run smoothly and efficiently.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<!-- /wp:column --></div>
<!-- /wp:columns --></div>
<!-- /wp:group -->

<!-- wp:group {"metadata":{"name":"Blog"},"style":{"spacing":{"padding":{"top":"var:preset|spacing|50","bottom":"var:preset|spacing|50"}}},"layout":{"type":"constrained"}} -->
<div class="wp-block-group" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)"><!-- wp:group {"layout":{"type":"flex","flexWrap":"nowrap","justifyContent":"space-between"}} -->
<div class="wp-block-group"><!-- wp:heading -->

<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:buttons -->

<div id="contacts" class="wp-block-group" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-right:0;padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-left:0"><!-- wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"style":{"typography":{"fontSize":"18px"}}} -->

<!-- /wp:paragraph -->
